'''Vorkeesk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kadas'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kadas'sa'Nikto]] who worked for [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he had a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] placed on his head in the same [[Standard year/Legends|year]] by [[Watto/Legends|Watto]] because he [[Death/Legends|killed]] somebody who owed Watto money. The bounty was 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,500 dead, and was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] for 3,000 credits.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
